signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% YoY, Up from 1.9% in February | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026, confirming preliminary estimates and marking the highest level since January 2024, driven by a 7.2% surge in energy prices including 20% higher fuel and 44.4% for heating oil.[1]

signals.headline: New Maine Senate Polling Improves Democrats' 2026 Path** | YES | MED confidence[3]
signals.raw:
New Maine Senate Polling Improves Democrats' 2026 Path** | YES | MED confidence[3]  
Latest polls show Democrats gaining ground in Maine's Senate race involving Susan Collins, potentially easing their path to flipping the chamber where Republicans hold a slim 53-45 edge (with independents)[1][3]. This could shift 2026 control markets, though it's one race amid broader battlegrounds[1][3].
